stories.title: Keir Starmer resigns as UK prime minister
stories.summary: Starmer stepped down under pressure from his own party, clearing the way for what would be Britain's seventh prime minister in a decade, with Andy Burnham the likely successor.

stories.title: US and Iran agree to 'road map' toward a final deal
stories.summary: Mediators say Washington and Tehran reached a framework to keep the Strait of Hormuz open and extend the ceasefire, setting up 60 days of nuclear talks.

stories.title: China hits US firms with new export controls
stories.summary: Beijing imposed export controls on 10 American defense and rare-earth companies and barred government buyers from 46 US firms, escalating trade tensions.

stories.title: Tusk warns Poland-Ukraine rift is a 'strategic mistake'
stories.summary: Poland's prime minister cautioned against an escalating dispute after President Nawrocki stripped Ukraine's Zelenskyy of Poland's highest honour over a WWII commemoration row.

stories.title: Colombia turns right as de la Espriella claims win
stories.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella's preliminary victory signals a sharp rightward shift on security, the economy and the country's peace process.

stories.title: S&P 500 little changed as oil falls on Iran talks
stories.summary: Wall Street held steady and oil slid as investors weighed progress in the US-Iran negotiations, while European stocks rose with the Stoxx 600 up 0.7%.

stories.title: Sterling slides on Starmer resignation
stories.summary: The pound weakened toward its 2026 lows as traders assessed what a potential Burnham-led government would mean for UK borrowing, tax and fiscal credibility.

stories.title: SpaceX shares tumble more than 10%
stories.summary: SpaceX traded near $165 after closing at $185 on June 18, pacing for its worst day since the stock's June 12 debut.

stories.title: Transformer co-author Shazeer leaves Google for OpenAI
stories.summary: Noam Shazeer, a co-author of the foundational 2017 Transformer paper, announced he is departing Google DeepMind to join OpenAI.

stories.title: EU picks EUROPA Consortium for sovereign AI push
stories.summary: The European Commission named the EUROPA Consortium winner of its Frontier AI Grand Challenge, backed by a 6,000-chip NVIDIA Blackwell cluster to build a 400B-parameter open model.

stories.title: China unveils $295B five-year AI infrastructure plan
stories.summary: Beijing announced a government AI buildout worth roughly $59 billion in state-directed spending per year.

stories.title: ChatGPT's chatbot market share dips below 50%
stories.summary: ChatGPT fell to 46.4% of the market by late May, the first time under half, as Gemini rose to 27.7% and Claude reached 10.3%.

stories.title: Bitcoin down about 30% year-to-date
stories.summary: A sharp correction deepened as institutional investors fled and leveraged positions unwound across digital assets.

stories.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post record outflow streak
stories.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs shed $4.4 billion over a record 13-day stretch of net outflows in early June.

stories.title: OSL Group secures Australian financial services licence
stories.summary: The crypto firm won an AFSL, strengthening regulated stablecoin and payments infrastructure in Australia.

stories.title: NASA's Roman telescope could find ~100,000 exoplanets
stories.summary: The Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope, now targeting an earlier September 2026 launch, could discover more worlds than all prior missions combined.

stories.title: NASA, Relativity Space partner on Mars mission
stories.summary: NASA will supply the Aeolus atmospheric-science payload while Relativity Space provides the spacecraft, rocket and cruise operations to reach Mars.

stories.title: 'Amaterasu' cosmic ray may be a heavy nucleus
stories.summary: New research suggests the extreme particle is not a proton but an ultraheavy atomic nucleus, heavier than iron.

stories.title: GLP-1 drugs tied to 30% lower breast-cancer risk
stories.summary: A large study found women taking GLP-1 medications were about 30% less likely to develop breast cancer.

stories.title: NHS England rolls out five-session prostate radiotherapy
stories.summary: Eligible men with early-stage prostate cancer will be offered SABR, cutting treatment from at least 20 sessions to five within a fortnight.

stories.title: New drug targets KRAS in pancreatic cancer
stories.summary: Daraxonrasib goes after the KRAS mutation that drives most pancreatic cancers.

stories.title: Messi breaks World Cup scoring record
stories.summary: Lionel Messi netted his 18th World Cup goal in stoppage time as Argentina beat Austria 2-0 at the 2026 tournament.

stories.title: Wyndham Clark wins 2026 US Open
stories.summary: Clark closed with a 73 to finish 4 under at Shinnecock Hills, going wire-to-wire to beat Sam Burns by a stroke for his second US Open title.

stories.title: Spain routs Saudi Arabia 4-0 at World Cup
stories.summary: Spain cruised in group-stage play as the 2026 World Cup continued across the US, Mexico and Canada.

stories.title: 'Scary Movie' reboot tops the box office
stories.summary: Paramount-Miramax's Scary Movie won the weekend with a franchise-record opening north of $52 million, with the Wayans brothers back on board.

stories.title: Box office posts first $1B month since 2019
stories.summary: May 2026 became theaters' first billion-dollar domestic month since 2019, with the year running about 13% ahead of last.

stories.title: 'Masters of the Universe' opens in theaters
stories.summary: Amazon MGM's Masters of the Universe debuted to an estimated $31 million-plus alongside other June releases.
